subject: Fix sonar issue in xacml-pdp
commit_message:
Fix sonar issue in xacml-pdp

Fixing a newly reported sonar issue
- return an emtpy map instead of null.

Issue-ID: POLICY-3077
Change-Id: I9452cb9dec53170815949d00b97f387551ce5197
Signed-off-by: Ram Krishna Verma <ram_krishna.verma@bell.ca>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-xacml-pdp-master-verify-java/742/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-xacml-pdp-master-verify-java/742

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I'll +1 this, but not sure if the calling methods check for empty vs null. I think its ok though if the verify job worked.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> I'll +1 this, but not sure if the calling methods check for empty vs null. I think its ok though if the verify job worked.

Agree Pam, I thought the same as well.

Patch Set 1:

Question:

I checked the references, there is this location here that I am not sure what would be the behavior down the line in that method and its invoking methods, is the behavior ok when it goes through this leg of code and then go up to the caller, as there is no check if the map is null or empty as in other places in the code:

https://git.onap.org/policy/xacml-pdp/tree/applications/common/src/main/java/org/onap/policy/pdp/xacml/application/common/std/StdMatchableTranslator.java#n189

Not sure about external callers and how they handle response. May be Pam can confirm.
Otherwise, I am okay to abandon the review and let the sonar issue remain open.
